personal.name: Jesús de Luis
personal.title: SRE Platform Engineer
personal.summary: SRE & Platform Engineer with 10+ years of experience building robust CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure automation across enterprise environments. Specialised in CI/CD (Azure Pipelines and GitHub Actions), Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Tofu), Azure cloud, and Docker orchestration. Strong advocate of evangelization and continuous learning, driving adoption of best practices, mentoring teams, and fostering a culture of collaboration across development and operations through automation, scripting, and security-first engineering.
personal.summaryImpact: Transformed platform reliability by moving from a single production environment to a robust multi-environment strategy (up to 9 environments, including 6 pre-production), significantly reducing the likelihood of critical production incidents. Empowered developers with production-like local testing via devcontainers and Docker, increasing delivery speed and confidence. Additionally, implemented ephemeral environments that are automatically created and destroyed, enabling scalable, cost-efficient, and faster validation in pre-production stages.

experience.description: Automation of Infrastructure as Code (IaC), CI/CD pipelines, and cloud platform engineering
Design and implementation of CI/CD pipelines, IaC automation, and scripting to streamline delivery processes and enhance platform reliability
Delivered integration and e‑commerce solutions to enhance platform connectivity and digital commerce capabilities
Led Integration, IoT, and Big Data initiatives, contributing to both solution delivery and presales activities
Performance, teaching and event magic shows

formal.address: Calle San Juán de Ortega 10B, 3ºA · 28050 Madrid, Spain

workExperience.description: Transformed platform architecture by implementing a governed 9-environment model and migrating 95% of data ingestions to Databricks. Boosted developer autonomy (90%) through Docker-based local workflows and strengthened security with Fortify/SonarQube integration in CI/CD. Leading the strategic migration to GitHub Enterprise.
workExperience.stack: Databricks · Docker · Fortify · Terraform · Azure · GitHub Actions · Datadog · Azure DevOps · CI/CD

workExperience.description: Designed and delivered “Project Odin” infrastructure with automated ephemeral environments, eliminating testing bottlenecks and accelerating validation cycles. Implemented CI/CD and monitoring standards on Azure, ensuring full environment parity and enabling dynamic, self-service stacks.
workExperience.stack: Ephemeral Environments · IaC · Azure · PowerShell · CI/CD · SAFe

workExperience.description: Modernised a legacy monolithic e-commerce platform by designing and developing backend services using cloud-native technologies, including OpenShift (Docker/pods) and Jenkins, improving scalability and deployment efficiency.
workExperience.stack: ATG · Spring Boot · Handlebars · OpenShift · Jenkins · Kafka

workExperience.description: Supported platform architecture and delivered RESTful backend services (Spring Boot, JPA, MongoDB/SQL), while managing Linux/Azure infrastructure and contributing to technical presales engagements.
workExperience.stack: Spring Boot · JPA · MongoDB · SQL · REST · Linux · Azure

workExperience.description: Delivered web application solutions for Smart Cities initiatives (TORO Project, Vodafone Connected City) on the IOC platform using Z-Systems, supporting digital city infrastructure and connected services.
workExperience.stack: Java · JavaScript · HTML · REST · DB2 · IBM Broker · Z-Systems

workExperience.description: Integrated Markit EDM into BBVA Asset Management to support Data Quality Management (DQM) and regulatory reporting aligned with AIFMD requirements.
workExperience.stack: Scrum · Markit EDM · Data Quality Management · AIFMD

education.detail: Networks and Systems specialisation. Merit Award in project management. Final project: idibidi — Android app supporting non-verbal patient communication.
Engineering exchange programme, full academic year.

personal.name: Jesús de Luis
personal.title: Ingeniero de Plataforma SRE
personal.summary: Ingeniero SRE y de Plataforma con más de 10 años de experiencia construyendo pipelines de CI/CD robustos y automatización de infraestructura cloud en entornos empresariales. Especializado en CI/CD (Azure Pipelines y GitHub Actions), Infraestructura como Código (Terraform, Tofu), cloud en Azure y orquestación con Docker. Firme defensor de la evangelización técnica y del aprendizaje continuo, impulsando la adopción de buenas prácticas, mentorizando equipos y fomentando una cultura de colaboración entre desarrollo y operaciones mediante automatización, scripting e ingeniería con enfoque en seguridad.
personal.summaryImpact: Transformé la fiabilidad de plataforma al pasar de un único entorno de producción a una estrategia robusta multi-entorno (hasta 9 entornos, incluidos 6 de preproducción), reduciendo de forma significativa la probabilidad de incidencias críticas en producción. Potencié la autonomía de desarrollo con pruebas locales similares a producción mediante devcontainers y Docker, aumentando la velocidad y la confianza en la entrega. Además, implementé entornos efímeros que se crean y destruyen automáticamente, habilitando validaciones más escalables, rápidas y eficientes en coste en fases de preproducción.

experience.description: Automatización de Infraestructura como Código (IaC), pipelines de CI/CD e ingeniería de plataforma cloud
Diseño e implementación de pipelines de CI/CD, automatización IaC y scripting para agilizar procesos de entrega y mejorar la fiabilidad de la plataforma
Entrega de soluciones de integración y e-commerce para mejorar la conectividad de la plataforma y las capacidades de comercio digital
Liderazgo de iniciativas de Integración, IoT y Big Data, contribuyendo tanto a la entrega de soluciones como a actividades de preventa
Actuación, docencia y espectáculos de magia para eventos
